heading: View Teams
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo list all teams in your organization using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas teams list [options]

```To return the details for the team you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas teams describe [options]

```To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas teams list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-teams-list) and
[atlas teams describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-teams-describe).Related Links* [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

* [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)**Ui:**Atlas UITo view your teams using the Atlas UI:Your teams display.
